# userDiscordConnect

Connects the Discord user to this Linear account via OAuth2.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`UserPayload`](../objects/user_payload-object.md)!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `code` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The Discord OAuth code. |
| `redirectUri` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The Discord OAuth redirect URI. |
